steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The claim requires a quotation that uses natural imagery in a comparison to convey Demetrio's mental state. Two requirements: (1) an explicit comparison using a natural image, and (2) the comparison describes his thoughts or mind.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A: describes a physical scene in nature but contains no comparison to Demetrio's mental state. ✗
  • Choice B — 'Memories crowded and buzzed through his brain like bees about a hive': the simile 'like bees about a hive' is an explicit natural comparison applied directly to his mental state — chaotic, swarming thoughts. ✓
  • Choice C: uses natural imagery but describes an external scene, not a comparison to his mind. ✗
  • Choice D: presents a sensory observation without comparing it to his mental state. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
